ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate Set
Off Calendar Jan-04-2021 Continued To Feb-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Jeff Strobel and the Attorney Stephen McDonagh to appear on February 1, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate Set
Off Calendar Nov-02-2020 Continued To Jan-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen McDonagh, Esq., counsel for Jeff Strobel, Executor (appearing by video conference).

At the outset, the Court notes that the matter is on calendar for the status of the close of the estate and in that regard, notes that no Inventory and Appraisal has yet been filed. Mr. McDonagh reports that the subject estate is the beneficiary of two other estates in another county that have yet to close, one of which should be closing next week. Mr. Strobel reports that the estate which is expected to close next week will distribute to this estate and that of William Mehegan and that the William Mehegan estate will, in turn, make further distribution to this estate.

Noting the ostensible complexity of the various outstanding proceedings, the Court continues the matter to January 4, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Court will require the filing of a Report on the status of estate administration which must be a noticed petition and file-endorsed copies of the same delivered to the Examiner on or before December 18, 2020.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
